title: Giant Tree Stump
description: Adds a large Tree Stump to forest and plains biomes.
body:
**This simple mod adds a large Tree Stump to forest and plains biomes.**
![Tree stump](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c80c52e3e4fffbba1f68cbac1ea0691e2eacc34d.jpeg)


 

The terrain around the stump is designed to blend naturally with the biome.
perfect spot to build a base on top.

This mod is also part of the combined ''Giant Natural Additions'' mod.


Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks
